structured_content.response:
I have executed process J09A as specified:

- Created and populated `J09A_temp` from `decision_table` for tours starting with `J09A`.
- Applied all `ENTSCHEIDUNG` classification rules in the given order.
- Joined in data from `EABLG`, `NET_MASTER`, and `SALES_MASTER`, then selected customer data per the “sales data present / else net data” rule.
- Identified mandatory meter readings using `EABL` for the 2023 & 2024 “Maschinelle Schätzung - SAP” condition and set `ENTSCHEIDUNG = 'MANDATORY_READING'` accordingly.
- Exported mandatory readings to:
  - `J09A_MANDATORY_READING.csv`  
    - Path: `sessions/gpt-5.1/processadaptation_extension_estimates_processadaptationmethod_generate_bpmn_tour_J09A_seed_4012/J09A_MANDATORY_READING.csv`  
    - Rows: 148  
  - Emailed to `mandatory.reading@provider.com`.
- Exported all remaining rows to:
  - `J09A.csv`  
    - Path: `sessions/gpt-5.1/processadaptation_extension_estimates_processadaptationmethod_generate_bpmn_tour_J09A_seed_4012/J09A.csv`  
    - Rows: 4752  
  - Emailed to `meter.readings@evu.com`.
- Dropped the temporary table `J09A_temp`.

The process has completed successfully and is now finished.

kwargs.content:
Process_rule `J09A` has been executed successfully. Summary of what was done:

- Created and populated a temporary table `J09A_temp` from `decision_table` for all tours starting with `J09A`.
- Applied all `ENTSCHEIDUNG` (decision) classification rules in the defined order.
- Joined in master data from:
  - `EABLG`
  - `NET_MASTER`
  - `SALES_MASTER`
- Selected customer data according to the rule “use sales data if present, otherwise net data”.
- Determined mandatory meter readings using `EABL` for 2023 & 2024 with the condition “Maschinelle Schätzung - SAP” and set `ENTSCHEIDUNG = 'MANDATORY_READING'` for those.
- Exported results:
  - Mandatory readings:
    - File: `J09A_MANDATORY_READING.csv`  
    - Path:  
      `sessions/gpt-5.1/processadaptation_extension_estimates_processadaptationmethod_generate_bpmn_tour_J09A_seed_4012/J09A_MANDATORY_READING.csv`  
    - Rows: 148  
    - Sent via email to: `mandatory.reading@provider.com`
  - All remaining rows:
    - File: `J09A.csv`  
    - Path:  
      `sessions/gpt-5.1/processadaptation_extension_estimates_processadaptationmethod_generate_bpmn_tour_J09A_seed_4012/J09A.csv`  
    - Rows: 4752  
    - Sent via email to: `meter.readings@evu.com`
- Dropped the temporary table `J09A_temp`.

If you want, I can next help you inspect or adjust the rule behind `J09A` (e.g., modify decision criteria, export targets, or time windows).
